metadata.title: Wellbeing.

home.title: A space for the mind.
home.description: No pressure. No rules. Just a safe place designed for your peace and daily balance.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: We believe in a world where mental health care is as natural as breathing. Our goal is to create tools that help you find inner peace in a fast-paced world.

contact.title: Stay in Touch
contact.description: Want to learn more? Join our newsletter.

contact.privacyText: I agree to have my email collected for newsletter purposes. We process in accordance with GDPR.
